answer: Kevin Wayne Durant (born September 29, 1988), also known by his initials KD, is an American professional basketball player widely regarded as one of the greatest players of all time. His full biography — early life, college career at Texas, professional career (Seattle/Oklahoma City Thunder, Golden State Warriors, Brooklyn Nets, Phoenix Suns), Olympic/national team career, and personal life — is documented on his Wikipedia page (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kevin_Durant), shown in the captured screenshots.
